---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed). 31b8e172-b470-440e-83d8-e6b185028602::31b8e172-b470-440e-83d8-e6b185028602

# Performance Measures

## Hannah Chaney

These are the Performance Measures. This is the [main site](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/). The ones I administer are:

- [Subsidence Reversal and Carbon Sequestration](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/pm/subsidence-reversal-and-carbon-sequestration)

- [Sustainable Groundwater](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/pm/sustainable-groundwater)

- [All Performance Measures Under Chapter 7: Protect People and Property](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/chapter/protect-people-and-property)

- [Yolo Bypass Inundation](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/pm/yolo-bypass-inundation)

- [Restoring Land-Water Connection](https://viewperformance.deltacouncil.ca.gov/pm/restoring-land-water-connection)

- All Flow Performance Measures

[@restorin2025]


```{r}
x<- c(1, 3, 15)
x^2
```


```{r}
x <- 4 * 8

hights_ft <- c(5.2, 6.0, 5.7)

coef <- 3.14
```
